statement:
theorem congr_mtr_eq {xs : List Symbol} :
    c.toDA.mtr c.toDA.start xs = ⟦ xs ⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize h_rev : xs.reverse = ys
  induction ys generalizing xs
  case nil => grind [List.reverse_eq_nil_iff]
  case cons y ys h_ind =>
    obtain ⟨rfl⟩ := List.reverse_eq_cons_iff.mp h_rev
    specialize h_ind (xs := ys.reverse) (by grind)
    grind [Quotient.lift_mk]

statement: theorem congr_language_eq {a : Quotient c.eq} : language (FinAcc.mk c.toDA {a}) = eqvCls a :=
proof_text:
by
  ext
  #adaptation_note
  
  constructor <;>
  · intro h
    simpa [mem_language, Accepts, congr_mtr_eq] using h

statement:
theorem hist_run_proj {xs : ωSequence Symbol} {ss : ωSequence (State × Hist)}
    (h_run : (na.addHist start' tr').Run xs ss) : na.Run xs (ss.map fst) :=
proof_text:
by
  obtain ⟨h_start, h_trans⟩ := h_run
  simp only [addHist] at h_trans
  grind [Run]

statement:
theorem hist_run_exists {xs : ωSequence Symbol} {ss : ωSequence State}
    (h_run : na.Run xs ss) : ∃ ss', (na.addHist start' tr').Run xs ss' ∧ ss'.map fst = ss :=
proof_text:
by
  use ⟨fun n ↦ (ss n, makeHist start' tr' xs ss n)⟩
  constructor
  · simp only [addHist]
    grind [Run]
  · grind

by
  have (k : ℕ) := (h_run.trans k).right
  apply frequently_leadsTo_frequently h_inf
  apply leadsTo_trans (q := {s | s.snd = !i})
  · apply step_leadsTo
    grind
  · apply until_frequently_not_leadsTo
    · grind
    · apply Frequently.mono h_inf
      grind

statement:
lemma inter_freq_comp_acc_freq_acc {xs : ωSequence Symbol} {ss : ωSequence ((Π i, State i) × Bool)}
    (h_run : (interNA na acc).Run xs ss)
    (h_inf_f : ∃ᶠ k in atTop, ss k ∈ {s | s.fst false ∈ acc false})
    (h_inf_t : ∃ᶠ k in atTop, ss k ∈ {s | s.fst true ∈ acc true}) :
    ∃ᶠ k in atTop, ss k ∈ interAccept acc :=
proof_text:
by
  have (k : ℕ) := (h_run.trans k).right
  have h_univ : ∃ᶠ k in atTop, ss k ∈ univ := by simp [atTop_neBot]
  have (b : Bool) : interAcc b acc = {⟨_, b'⟩ | b' = b} ∩ {⟨p,_⟩ | p b ∈ acc b} := by
    ext; grind
  have : {⟨_, b⟩ : (Π i, State i) × Bool | b = false}ᶜ = {⟨_, b⟩ | b = true} := by
    ext; grind
  apply frequently_leadsTo_frequently h_univ
  apply leadsTo_cases_or (q := {⟨_, b⟩ | b = false}) <;>
  grind [until_frequently_leadsTo_and, univ_inter]

statement:
theorem inter_language_eq :
    language (Buchi.mk (interNA na acc) (interAccept acc)) =
    ⨅ i, language (Buchi.mk (na i) (acc i)) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply mem_ext
  intro xs
  simp only [ωLanguage.mem_iInf]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨ss, h_run, h_inf⟩ i
    use ss.map (fun s ↦ s.fst i)
    constructor
    · apply iProd_run_iff.mp <| hist_run_proj h_run
    · simp only [interAccept, mem_union, frequently_or_distrib] at h_inf
      cases i
      · rcases h_inf with h_inf_f | h_inf_t
        · apply Frequently.mono h_inf_f
          grind
        · apply Frequently.mono <| inter_freq_acc_freq_acc h_run h_inf_t
          grind
      · rcases h_inf with h_inf_f | h_inf_t
        · apply Frequently.mono <| inter_freq_acc_freq_acc h_run h_inf_f
          grind
        · apply Frequently.mono h_inf_t
          grind
  · intro h
    choose ss_i h_ss_i using h
    let ss_p : ωSequence (Π i, State i) := fun k i ↦ ss_i i k
    have h_ss_p : (iProd na).Run xs ss_p := by grind [Run]
    have (k : ℕ) (i : Bool) : ss_p k i = ss_i i k := rfl
    obtain ⟨ss, h_run, _⟩ := hist_run_exists h_ss_p
    use ss, h_run
    apply inter_freq_comp_acc_freq_acc h_run
    · apply Frequently.mono (h_ss_i false).2
      grind
    · apply Frequently.mono (h_ss_i true).2
      grind

statement: theorem le_omegaPow_congr [Inhabited α] {l1 l2 : Language α} (h : l1 ≤ l2) : l1^ω ≤ l2^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  rintro s ⟨xs, rfl, h_xs⟩
  refine ⟨xs, rfl, ?_⟩
  intro k; specialize h_xs k
  simp only [Language.mem_sub_one, ne_eq] at h_xs ⊢

statement: theorem omegaPow_of_sub_one [Inhabited α] : (l - 1)^ω = l^ω :=

theorem omegaPow_eq_empty [Inhabited α] (h : l^ω = ⊥) : l ≤ 1 :=
proof_text:
by
  intro x h_x
  by_contra h_contra
  suffices h' : (const x).flatten ∈ l^ω by

statement: theorem hmul_seq_prop : l * p = { s : ωSequence α | ∃ k, s.take k ∈ l ∧ s.drop k ∈ p } :=
proof_text:
by
  ext s; constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, h_x, t, h_t, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x.length, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [take_append_of_le_length]
    · simpa [drop_append_ωSequence]
  · rintro ⟨k, h1, h2⟩
    exact ⟨s.take k, h1, s.drop k, h2, by simp⟩

statement:
theorem omegaPow_seq_prop [Inhabited α] :
    l^ω = { s : ωSequence α |
      ∃ f : ℕ → ℕ, StrictMono f ∧ f 0 = 0 ∧ ∀ m, s.extract (f m) (f (m + 1)) ∈ l } :=
proof_text:
by
  ext s; constructor
  · rintro ⟨xs, rfl, h_xs⟩
    simp [forall_and, List.ne_nil_iff_length_pos] at h_xs
    refine ⟨xs.cumLen, by grind [cumLen_strictMono], by simp [cumLen_zero], ?_⟩
    grind
  · rintro ⟨f, hm, h0, he⟩
    refine ⟨(fun m ↦ s.extract (f m) (f (m + 1))), ?_, ?_⟩
    · apply strictMono_flatten hm h0
    · intro m
      change s.extract (f m) (f (m + 1)) ∈ l - 1
      simp only [he, Language.mem_sub_one, ne_eq, extract_eq_nil_iff, ge_iff_le, not_le, true_and]
      apply hm; omega

statement: theorem omegaPow_coind' [Inhabited α] (h_nn : [] ∉ l) (h_le : p ≤ l * p) : p ≤ l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  simp only [le_def]
  intro s h_s
  have h_nxt m (hm : s.drop m ∈ p) : ∃ n > m, s.extract m n ∈ l ∧ s.drop n ∈ p := by
    obtain ⟨k, _⟩ := hmul_seq_prop ▸ h_le hm
    grind [extract_eq_drop_take]
  choose nxt_n nxt_p using h_nxt
  let f := iter_helper (fun n ↦ s.drop n ∈ p) nxt_n
  have h_f (n) : f n < f (n + 1) ∧ s.extract (f n) (f (n + 1)) ∈ l ∧ s.drop (f (n + 1)) ∈ p := by
    induction n <;> grind [iter_helper]
  rw [omegaPow_seq_prop]
  use f
  grind [strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ, iter_helper]

statement: theorem omegaPow_coind [Inhabited α] (h_le : p ≤ (l - 1) * p) : p ≤ l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  rw [← omegaPow_of_sub_one]
  refine omegaPow_coind' ?_ h_le
  simp

statement:
theorem omegaPow_le_hmul_omegaPow' [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) :
    l^ω ≤ (l - 1) * l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  rintro s ⟨xs, rfl, h_xs⟩
  refine ⟨xs.head, h_xs 0, xs.tail.flatten, ⟨xs.tail, rfl, ?_⟩, ?_⟩ <;>
  grind [l.mem_sub_one]

statement: theorem omegaPow_le_hmul_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : l^ω ≤ l * l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  have h1 := omegaPow_le_hmul_omegaPow' l
  refine le_trans h1 ?_
  refine le_hmul_congr ?_ ?_
  · apply sdiff_le
  · apply le_refl

statement: theorem hmul_omegaPow_le_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : l * l^ω ≤ l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  suffices h : l * l^ω ≤ (l - 1) * (l * l^ω) by exact omegaPow_coind h
  rw [← mul_hmul, Language.sub_one_mul, ← Language.mul_sub_one, mul_hmul]
  refine le_hmul_congr ?_ ?_
  · apply le_refl
  · apply omegaPow_le_hmul_omegaPow'

statement: theorem hmul_omegaPow_eq_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : l * l^ω = l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  apply le_antisymm
  · apply hmul_omegaPow_le_omegaPow
  · apply omegaPow_le_hmul_omegaPow

statement: theorem omegaPow_le_kstar_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : l^ω ≤ (l∗)^ω :=
theorem kstar_omegaPow_le_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : (l∗)^ω ≤ l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  suffices h : (l∗)^ω ≤ (l - 1) * (l∗)^ω by exact omegaPow_coind h
  calc
    _ ≤ (l∗ - 1) * (l∗)^ω := omegaPow_le_hmul_omegaPow' _
    _ = (l - 1) * l∗ * (l∗)^ω := by simp [Language.kstar_sub_one]
    _ = (l - 1) * (l∗ * (l∗)^ω) := mul_hmul
    _ = _ := by simp

statement: theorem kstar_omegaPow_eq_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : (l∗)^ω = l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  apply le_antisymm
  · apply kstar_omegaPow_le_omegaPow
  · apply omegaPow_le_kstar_omegaPow

statement: theorem kstar_hmul_omegaPow_eq_omegaPow [Inhabited α] (l : Language α) : l∗ * l^ω = l^ω :=
proof_text:
by
  calc
    _ = l∗ * (l∗)^ω := by simp
    _ = (l∗)^ω := by rw [hmul_omegaPow_eq_omegaPow]
    _ = _ := by simp

proof_text:
by
  have h0 : ls.cumLen 0 ≤ n := by simp [cumLen_zero]
  have h1 : n < ls.cumLen 1 := by simpa [cumLen_succ, cumLen_zero]

theorem cumLen_segment_one_add {ls : ωSequence (List α)} (h_ls : ∀ k, (ls k).length > 0)
    (n : ℕ) (h_n : (ls 0).length ≤ n) :
    segment ls.cumLen n = 1 + segment (ls.drop 1).cumLen (n - (ls 0).length) :=
proof_text:
by
  classical
  have h0 : (ls.drop 1).cumLen 0 = 0 := by simp [cumLen_zero]
  rw [add_comm, segment_plus_one h0]; unfold Nat.segment
  simp only [Nat.count_eq_card_filter_range]
  have h1 : {x ∈ Finset.range (n + 1) | x ∈ Set.range ls.cumLen} = insert 0
      {x ∈ Finset.range (n + 1) | x ∈ Set.range ls.cumLen ∧ (ls 0).length ≤ x} := by
    ext k; simp only [Set.mem_range, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range, Finset.mem_insert]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨h_k, i, rfl⟩
      simp only [h_k, exists_apply_eq_apply, true_and, or_iff_not_imp_left]
      intro h_i
      suffices h : i = 1 + (i - 1) by grind [cumLen_one_add_drop]
      grind
    · rintro (rfl | _)
      · refine ⟨?_, 0, ?_⟩ <;> grind
      · grind
  have h2 : 0 ∉ {x ∈ Finset.range (n + 1) | x ∈ Set.range ls.cumLen ∧ (ls 0).length ≤ x} := by
    grind
  rw [h1, Finset.card_insert_of_notMem h2, Nat.add_one_sub_one]
  symm
  apply Set.BijOn.finsetCard_eq (fun n ↦ n + (ls 0).length)
  refine ⟨?_, by grind [injOn_of_injective, Injective], ?_⟩ <;>
  ( intro k; simp only [Set.mem_range, Finset.coe_filter, Finset.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq,
      le_add_iff_nonneg_left, _root_.zero_le, and_true] )
  · rintro ⟨h_k, i, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨?_, 1 + i, ?_⟩ <;> grind [cumLen_one_add_drop]
  · rintro ⟨h_k, ⟨i, rfl⟩, h_l0⟩
    have := cumLen_one_add_drop ls (i - 1)
    refine ⟨ls.cumLen i - (ls 0).length, ⟨?_, i - 1, ?_⟩, ?_⟩ <;> grind

theorem isChurchList_trans {ns : List ℕ} {cns cns' : SKI} (h : cns ↠ cns')
    (hcns' : IsChurchList ns cns') : IsChurchList ns cns :=
proof_text:
by
  match ns with
  | [] =>
    intro c n
    exact Trans.trans (parallel_mRed (MRed.head c h) .refl) (hcns' c n)
  | x :: xs =>
    intro c n
    obtain ⟨cx, cxs, hcx, hcxs, hred⟩ := hcns' c n
    exact ⟨cx, cxs, hcx, hcxs, Trans.trans (parallel_mRed (MRed.head c h) .refl) hred⟩

  · apply isChurchList_trans (MRed.tail Snd hp)

    (Cons ⬝ x ⬝ xs ⬝ c ⬝ n) ↠ c ⬝ x ⬝ (xs ⬝ c ⬝ n) :=

proof_text:
by
  intro c n
  use cx, cxs, hcx, hcxs
  exact cons_def cx cxs c n

lemma toChurch_cons (x : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) :

theorem toChurch_correct (ns : List ℕ) : IsChurchList ns (toChurch ns) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction ns with
  | nil => exact nil_correct
  | cons x xs ih => exact cons_correct (SKI.toChurch_correct x) ih

statement: theorem headD_def (d xs : SKI) : (HeadD ⬝ d ⬝ xs) ↠ xs ⬝ K ⬝ d :=

theorem headD_correct {d : ℕ} {cd : SKI} (hcd : IsChurch d cd)
    {ns : List ℕ} {cns : SKI} (hcns : IsChurchList ns cns) :
    IsChurch (ns.headD d) (HeadD ⬝ cd ⬝ cns) :=
proof_text:
by
  match ns with
  | [] =>
    simp only [List.headD_nil]
    apply isChurch_trans d (headD_def cd cns)
    apply isChurch_trans d (hcns K cd)
    exact hcd
  | x :: xs =>
    simp only [List.headD_cons]
    apply isChurch_trans x (headD_def cd cns)
    obtain ⟨cx, cxs, hcx, _, hred⟩ := hcns K cd
    exact isChurch_trans x hred (isChurch_trans x (MRed.K cx _) hcx)

theorem head_correct (ns : List ℕ) (cns : SKI) (hcns : IsChurchList ns cns) :
    IsChurch (ns.headD 0) (Head ⬝ cns) :=

theorem tailStep_def (h p : SKI) :
    (TailStep ⬝ h ⬝ p) ↠ MkPair ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p) ⬝ (Cons ⬝ h ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p)) :=

theorem tail_def (xs : SKI) :
    (Tail ⬝ xs) ↠ Fst ⬝ (xs ⬝ TailStep ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ Nil ⬝ Nil)) :=
theorem tail_init : IsChurchListPair [] [] (MkPair ⬝ Nil ⬝ Nil) :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  · apply isChurchList_trans (fst_correct _ _); exact nil_correct
  · apply isChurchList_trans (snd_correct _ _); exact nil_correct

by
  apply isChurchListPair_trans (tailStep_def cx p)
  exact ⟨isChurchList_trans (fst_correct _ _) hp.2,
         isChurchList_trans (snd_correct _ _) (cons_correct hcx hp.2)⟩

statement:
theorem tailFold_correct (ns : List ℕ) (cns : SKI) (hcns : IsChurchList ns cns) :
    ∃ p, (cns ⬝ TailStep ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ Nil ⬝ Nil)) ↠ p ∧
         IsChurchListPair ns.tail ns p :=
proof_text:
by
  induction ns generalizing cns with
  | nil =>
    use MkPair ⬝ Nil ⬝ Nil
    constructor
    · exact hcns TailStep (MkPair ⬝ Nil ⬝ Nil)
    · exact tail_init
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨cx, cxs, hcx, hcxs, hred⟩ := hcns TailStep (MkPair ⬝ Nil ⬝ Nil)
    obtain ⟨p_xs, hp_xs_red, hp_xs_pair⟩ := ih cxs hcxs
    have hstep := tailStep_correct hcx hp_xs_pair
    use TailStep ⬝ cx ⬝ p_xs
    constructor
    · exact Trans.trans hred (MRed.tail _ hp_xs_red)
    · exact hstep

statement:
theorem tail_correct (ns : List ℕ) (cns : SKI) (hcns : IsChurchList ns cns) :
    IsChurchList ns.tail (Tail ⬝ cns) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isChurchList_trans (tail_def cns)
  obtain ⟨p, hp_red, hp_pair⟩ := tailFold_correct ns cns hcns
  apply isChurchList_trans (MRed.tail Fst hp_red)
  exact hp_pair.1

by

statement:
theorem succHead_correct (ns : List ℕ) (cns : SKI) (hcns : IsChurchList ns cns) :
    IsChurchList [ns.headD 0 + 1] (SuccHead ⬝ cns) :=
proof_text:
by
  have hhead := head_correct ns cns hcns
  have hsucc := succ_correct (ns.headD 0) (Head ⬝ cns) hhead
  apply isChurchList_trans (.trans (B_tail_mred _ _ _ _ (B_def .Succ Head cns)) (C_def Cons Nil _))
  exact cons_correct hsucc nil_correct

lemma narrow_aux
    (trans : ∀ Γ σ τ, Sub Γ σ δ → Sub Γ δ τ → Sub Γ σ τ)
    (sub₁ : Sub (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ⟩ :: Δ) σ τ) (sub₂ : Sub Δ δ' δ) :
      Sub (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ) σ τ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ⟩ :: Δ = Θ at sub₁
  induction sub₁ generalizing Γ δ
  case trans_tvar σ _ σ' X' mem sub ih =>
    subst eq
    have p : ∀ δ, Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ⟩ :: Δ ~ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ⟩ :: (Γ ++ Δ) :=
      by grind [perm_middle]
    by_cases X = X'
    · grind only [= append_assoc, = Option.or_some, = dlookup_append, weaken, = dlookup_cons_eq,
        → wf, =_ singleton_append, =_ cons_append, = mem_append, = Option.or_eq_some_iff,
        = Option.mem_some, =_ append_assoc, trans_tvar, cases Or]
    · grind [Sub.weaken, sublist_append_of_sublist_right]
  case all => apply Sub.all (free_union Var) <;> grind
  #adaptation_note
  
  all_goals grind [Env.Wf.narrow, Ty.Wf.narrow, -append_assoc]

statement:
@[grind →]
lemma trans : Sub Γ σ δ → Sub Γ δ τ → Sub Γ σ τ :=
proof_text:
by
  intro sub₁ sub₂
  have δ_lc : δ.LC := by grind
  induction δ_lc generalizing Γ σ τ
  case top => cases sub₁ <;> cases sub₂ <;> grind
  case var X =>
    generalize eq : fvar X = γ at sub₁
    induction sub₁ <;> grind [cases Sub]
  case arrow σ' τ' _ _ _ _ =>
    generalize eq : σ'.arrow τ' = γ at sub₁
    induction sub₁ <;> grind [cases Sub]
  case sum σ' τ' _ _ _ _ =>
    generalize eq : σ'.sum τ' = γ at sub₁
    induction sub₁ <;> grind [cases Sub]
  case all σ' τ' _ _ _ _ _ =>
    generalize eq : σ'.all τ' = γ at sub₁
    induction sub₁
    case all =>
      cases eq
      cases sub₂
      case refl.top Γ σ'' τ'' _ _ _ _ _ _ _ =>
        have : Sub Γ (σ''.all τ'') (σ'.all τ') := by grind [all <| free_union Var]
        grind
      case refl.all Γ _ _ _ _ _ σ _ _ _ _ _ _ =>
        apply all (free_union Var)
        · grind
        · intro X nmem
          have eq : ∀ σ, ⟨X, Binding.sub σ⟩ :: Γ = [] ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub σ⟩ :: Γ := by grind
          grind [Sub.narrow_aux]
    all_goals grind

lemma map_subst (sub₁ : Sub (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ) σ τ) (sub₂ : Sub Δ δ δ') :
    Sub (Γ.map_val (·[X:=δ]) ++ Δ) (σ[X:=δ]) (τ[X:=δ]) :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ = Θ at sub₁
  induction sub₁ generalizing Γ
  case all => apply Sub.all (free_union Var) <;> grind [open_subst_var]
  case trans_tvar σ _ _ X' _ _ _ =>
    have := map_subst_nmem Δ X δ
    have : Γ ++ ⟨X, .sub δ'⟩ :: Δ ~ ⟨X, .sub δ'⟩ :: (Γ ++ Δ) := perm_middle
    have : .sub σ ∈ dlookup X' (⟨X, .sub δ'⟩ :: (Γ ++ Δ)) := by grind [perm_dlookup]
    have := @map_val_mem Var (f := ((·[X:=δ]) : Binding Var → Binding Var))
    by_cases X = X'
    · trans δ' <;> grind [→ mem_dlookup, Ty.subst_fresh, Ty.Wf.nmem_fv, weaken_head]
    · grind
  all_goals
    grind [Env.Wf.to_ok, Sub.refl, Env.Wf.map_subst, Ty.Wf.map_subst]

statement: theorem preservation (der : Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) (step : t ⭢βᶠ t') : Γ ⊢ t' ∶ τ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction der generalizing t' <;> cases step
  case abs.abs xs _ _ _ xs' _ => apply Typing.abs (free_union Var); grind
  case app.base h der _ _ der_l =>
    cases der_l
    cases h with | abs _ cofin => exact preservation_open cofin der
  all_goals grind

statement: theorem progress {t : Term Var} {τ : Ty Base} (ht : [] ⊢ t ∶ τ) : t.Value ∨ ∃ t', t ⭢βᶠ t' :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : [] = Γ at ht
  induction ht
  case var => simp_all
  case abs xs mem ih =>
    left
    constructor
    apply Term.LC.abs xs
    intros _ mem'
    exact (mem _ mem').lc
  case app Γ M σ τ N der_l der_r ih_l ih_r =>
    simp only [eq, forall_const] at *
    right
    cases ih_l with
    | inl val => cases val with | abs M _ => use M ^ N, by grind
    | inr step =>
      obtain ⟨M', _⟩ := step

lemma biorth_least_fact (G : Set P) :
      ∀ {F : Set P}, isFact F → G ⊆ F → G⫠⫠ ⊆ F :=
proof_text:
by
  let c : ClosureOperator (Set P) := biorthogonalClosure
  have h_min :
      ∀ {F : Set P}, isFact F → G ⊆ F → G⫠⫠ ⊆ F := by
    intro F hF hGF
    #adaptation_note
    
    have : F = c F := by
      simp only [isFact] at hF
      rw [hF]
      symm at hF ⊢
      apply ClosureOperator.IsClosed.closure_eq (congrArg orthogonal (congrArg orthogonal hF))
    have hF_closed : c.IsClosed F := (c.isClosed_iff).2 this.symm
    simpa [c] using ClosureOperator.closure_min hGF hF_closed
  apply h_min

lemma sInf_isFact {S : Set (Fact P)} :
  isFact (sInf ((fun F : Fact P => (F : Set P)) '' S)) :=
proof_text:
by
  have H' :
      ∀ X ∈ ((fun F : Fact P => (F : Set P)) '' S),
        biorthogonalClosure.IsClosed X := by
    intro X hX
    rcases hX with ⟨F, hF, rfl⟩
    exact (isFact_iff_closed (X := (F : Set P))).1 F.property
  have hclosed :biorthogonalClosure.IsClosed (sInf ((fun F : Fact P => (F : Set P)) '' S)) :=
    ClosureOperator.sInf_isClosed
      (c := biorthogonalClosure) (S := ((fun F : Fact P => (F : Set P)) '' S)) H'
  exact (isFact_iff_closed (X := sInf ((fun F : Fact P => (F : Set P)) '' S))).2 hclosed

proof_text:

  simp only [Set.subset_def, Set.mem_mul, forall_exists_index, and_imp]
  rintro _ p hp q hq rfl v hv
  rw [mul_assoc]

lemma coe_tensor_assoc {G H K : Fact P} :
    ((G ⊗ H) ⊗ K : Set P) = ((G : Set P) * ((H : Set P) * (K : Set P)))⫠⫠ :=
proof_text:
by
  simp only [tensor]
  refine Set.Subset.antisymm ?_ ?_
  · simp only [dualFact, mk_dual, mk_subset, coe_mk, dual_dual_subset_dual_iff]
    rw [K.eq]
    refine tensor_assoc_aux.trans ?_
    rw [← K.eq]
    grind
  repeat apply orth_antitone
  intro x hx
  rcases Set.mem_mul.mp hx with ⟨g, hg, y, hy, rfl⟩
  rcases Set.mem_mul.mp hy with ⟨h, hh, k, hk, rfl⟩
  have gh_mem : g * h ∈ ((G : Set P) * (H : Set P)) := Set.mul_mem_mul hg hh
  have gh_mem' : g * h ∈ ((G : Set P) * (H : Set P))⫠⫠ := (orth_extensive _) gh_mem
  exact Set.mem_mul.mpr ⟨g * h, gh_mem', k, hk, by simp [mul_assoc]⟩
